title: Solana Foundation Launches AI Agent Skills With One-Line Integration
description: The Solana Foundation has released a new toolkit intended to support AI-based projects on its network. The release, titled Solana Agent Skills, allows developers to add built-in components into AI tools using a single-line installation. In addition, the approach enables AI agents to interact directly with the Solana network while keeping its orderly functionality. Ad [...] The post Solana Foundation Launches AI Agent Skills With One-Line Integration appeared first on ETF Alerts .

title: Kakao Wraps Up Student AI Competition With 3,000 Participants
description: Kakao's student AI competition "AI Top 100 (Campus)" concluded successfully with about 3,000 preliminary applicants nationwide, as a Soongsil University freshman took the grand prize.

description: Some well-hyped companies never end up thriving. A few end up never turning a profit. This is not one of those companies.

title: ETtech Explainer: Agentic harness, the software that makes AI tick
description: Indian enterprises are increasingly adopting AI agents for complex business workflows, but the crucial 'agentic harness' is emerging as the key differentiator. This software framework enables AI models to act autonomously and safely, managing memory, tools, and human oversight, becoming the most contested layer in the AI value chain.
